products.description:
Bring order and style to your kitchen with this 2-Tier Round Turntable Spice Rack. The spinning stand gives you seamless access to all your spices, condiments, and oils while the vertical design keeps counters still looking clean.

Rotating 360° base gives quick, full access to everything stored Two levels of storage maximize vertical space for jars, bottles, and condiments Compact footprint ideal for tight countertops or small kitchens Modern, clean design that complements most décor styles Non-slip base ensures the rack stays steady during use Easy to wipe clean for low-maintenance upkeep Lightweight enough to move, yet solid when in place
products.name: 360Nest 2-Tier Lazy Susan Storage Rack

products.description:
Keep leftovers fresh and reduce single‑use plastic waste with this set of 3 Reusable Food Preservation Trays. Designed for everyday kitchen use, these trays are perfect for storing fruits, vegetables, snacks, and meal prep. They’re durable, easy to clean, and help maintain food freshness for longer - making them a practical and eco‑friendly addition to your home.

Pack of 3 Reusable and eco‑friendly Made to withstand regular use while preserving food Wash by hand or in the dishwasher Airtight clip closure helps seal in freshness and prevent spills Stackable trays keep your fridge or pantry organised
products.name: KitchenEase 3x Reusable Food Preservation Trays

products.description:
Stay effortlessly hydrated wherever life takes you with this premium silicone tumbler cup sling. Designed for active lifestyles, it securely holds handled tumblers, making it easy to carry your drink while hiking, biking, camping, or commuting. Lightweight, durable, and easy to attach, it’s the perfect solution for hydration on the go.

Made from stretchable silicone Flexible handles Easily fits 1.2L Tumblers Designed to securely hold tumblers with handles Easy to clean Hands-free convenience Attach to your backpack or bag for hydration on the move
products.name: Travel Go Silicone Tumbler Cup Sling Pouch
products.short_description: Travel Go Silicone Tumbler Cup Sling Pouch
